item.title: AlanShipnuck: Alan Shipnuck @AlanShipnuck · 22min The RORY book club Zoom is a go! April 20 at 5 pm Cali time. Everyone is invited and
item.description: Alan Shipnuck @AlanShipnuck · 22min The RORY book club Zoom is a go! April 20 at 5 pm Cali time. Everyone is invited and it’s free. If you’ve already DM’d your email, you’re good; details will be in your inbox in a day or two. Wanna get involved? DM your email! Thanks. 1 3 12 3 mil

item.title: NUCLRGOLF: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 21min #NEW — Kai Trump takes to IG following a trip to The Masters Tournament. “Had the best ti
item.description: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 21min #NEW — Kai Trump takes to IG following a trip to The Masters Tournament. “Had the best time at Augusta”, she wrote. 5 1 105 9 mil

item.title: JosephLaMagna: Joseph LaMagna @JosephLaMagna · 34min Six days from now, we’ll have an RBC Heritage champion 4 1 31 1 mil
item.description: Joseph LaMagna @JosephLaMagna · 34min Six days from now, we’ll have an RBC Heritage champion 4 1 31 1 mil

item.title: KVanValkenburg: Kevin Van Valkenburg @KVanValkenburg · 45min . @chambleebrandel made this point on Saturday night, and I want to re-emp
item.description: Kevin Van Valkenburg @KVanValkenburg · 45min . @chambleebrandel made this point on Saturday night, and I want to re-emphasize it after the fact. It was cool to see Rory fix his swing by himself on the range after a bad day. No coach, no Trackman, no training aids. Just the confidence that he knew his swing. 5 7 164 7 mil

item.title: NUCLRGOLF: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 56min #INTERVIEW — Rory McIlroy sat down with Todd Lewis immediately following his Masters vict
item.description:
NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 56min #INTERVIEW — Rory McIlroy sat down with Todd Lewis immediately following his Masters victory.
@TrackingRory De Golf Channel 4 19 468 31 mil

item.title:
jamierkennedy: Jamie Kennedy @jamierkennedy · 1h Next career goal for Rory?
Only two players in the history of the sport have won each
item.description:
Jamie Kennedy @jamierkennedy · 1h Next career goal for Rory?
Only two players in the history of the sport have won each of the majors multiple times.
Jack and Tiger.
McIlroy is just one more Open and US Open from doing that.
(FYI, those venues next year at St Andrews and Pebble...) 2 4 75 2 mil
